name: Thiokol Elkton
description_short: PolySpec/Thiokol manufactures industrial-grade polymer sealants, coatings, and flooring for chemical resistance and corrosion protection across commercial and marine markets.
description_long: PolySpec/Thiokol is a North American-based manufacturer specializing in high-performance polymer construction materials. The company is owned and operated by Holcim Solutions and Products US, LLC, positioning it as part of a larger industrial solutions provider. They serve industrial, commercial, and marine markets with specialized chemical-resistant products. The company positions itself as a recognized international leader in polymer construction technology with deep expertise in anticipating customer needs across diverse industrial applications. Their product portfolio includes sealants, coatings, linings, and flooring solutions engineered for demanding environments. Thiokol products, such as the 2235M elastomeric joint sealant, are designed for infrastructure applications including bridges, water treatment facilities, roadways, and tank systems. The company emphasizes material science expertise, offering NSF-approved products with technical documentation and safety resources. PolySpec/Thiokol distinguishes itself through specialized formulations like polysulfide polymer-based sealants that resist chemicals, aging, and thermal stress over extended service life. The company operates a portfolio of multiple brand lines including Tacky Tape, Sta'-Put, Permathane, Futura, and others, allowing them to address different industrial coating and sealant needs. However, this is fundamentally a B2B chemical manufacturing company, not a consumer finance provider. The current categorization as "payday-alternatives" is a significant data error—this company has zero connection to consumer lending, credit products, or financial services of any kind. The website contains no lending products, APR disclosures, loan terms, or consumer finance offerings.
services: Elastomeric joint sealants (THIOKOL 2235M, 2235SL, 2282 series) for concrete expansion joints
Polysulfide-based chemical-resistant sealants for water treatment and storage facilities
Bridge and roadway joint sealing solutions
Warehouse floor joint and sealing products
Secondary containment dike wall and floor sealants
Tank chine seal products for industrial storage systems
Concrete panel joint sealants and elastomeric coatings
Specialty polymer flooring and lining systems
Marine-grade polymer coatings for corrosion protection
Technical data sheets and performance documentation
Safety data sheets and regulatory compliance documentation
pros: NSF-approved formulations meeting regulatory standards for food-service and water-contact applications
Polysulfide polymer content provides documented resistance to mild acids, alkalies, and petroleum products
Products engineered to resist aging, UV exposure, ozone, and cyclic temperature changes over years of service
Comprehensive technical documentation including technical data sheets and safety data sheets publicly available
Multi-brand portfolio (Permathane, TuffRez, NovoRez, PolySpec) allows targeting diverse industrial needs
Retains elasticity during concrete movement, maintaining flexibility without shrinkage over time
Formulations contain no volatile solvents, reducing environmental and worker safety concerns
cons: This is an industrial chemical manufacturer, not a consumer finance company—complete category mismatch with current CreditDoc placement
Website provides no consumer-facing lending information, loan terms, APR disclosures, or financial service details
Company appears to operate primarily through industrial/commercial channels, not direct consumer marketing
No contact phone number or customer service information provided on website for consumer inquiries
Products require professional application and engineering expertise, not accessible to typical consumers
best_for: Industrial facility managers needing chemical-resistant concrete joint sealants for expansion joints and containment systems
Civil engineering contractors building or maintaining bridges, roadways, water treatment facilities, and tank infrastructure
Commercial property owners managing warehouse floors and secondary containment dike systems requiring durable sealing
diagnosis: PolySpec/Thiokol is a B2B industrial chemical manufacturer of polymer sealants and coatings, not a consumer finance company. The current "payday-alternatives" categorization is a critical data error with no factual basis. This company should be recategorized as "business-loans" or removed entirely from CreditDoc as it offers no consumer financial products, lending services, or credit-related offerings of any kind.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
